codeReview.summary: This fix resolves the prior launch-routing proof gaps by adding profile-ID trace capture at the launch coordinator seam and asserting those traces in rapid-switch browser/CLI tests, including A→B→C final-active routing. The new assertions now fail on stale routing even when provider type/executable class would otherwise match.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Procedure-attestation evidence remains inconsistent: handoff marks followedProcedure=true but does not include explicit context-read command evidence required by the skill's handoff discipline section.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Handoff 2026-04-10T05-12-35-948Z__integration-hardening-final-profile-id-launch-routing-proof__30fef8ff-fe3e-40c2-b145-1572b7fe8785.json lists only test commands under verification.commandsRun; .factory/skills/switcher-integration-worker/SKILL.md requires concrete context-read evidence when followedProcedure=true.

summary: Pass: reviewed transcript skeleton, handoff, commit diff, and both prior failed reviews. The implementation now proves final committed profile-ID routing for both browser and CLI launch chains via coordinator-level attempt traces, and it resolves the prior scope mismatch by directly fixing the previously flagged rapid-switch tests.
